invariants.name: No Secret Exposure
invariants.description: Sensitive files (.env, credentials, keys) must not be committed or exposed

invariants.name: Protected Branch Safety
invariants.description: Direct pushes to main/master are forbidden

invariants.name: Blast Radius Limit
invariants.description: A single operation must not modify too many files at once

invariants.name: Tests Before Push
invariants.description: Tests must pass before pushing code

invariants.name: No Force Push
invariants.description: Force pushes are forbidden unless explicitly authorized

invariants.name: No Skill Modification
invariants.description: Agent skill files (.claude/skills/) must not be modified by governed actions

invariants.name: No Scheduled Task Modification
invariants.description: Agents must not modify scheduled task definitions (.claude/scheduled-tasks/) directly

invariants.name: No Credential File Creation
invariants.description: Agents must not create or overwrite well-known credential files (SSH keys, cloud configs, auth tokens)

invariants.name: No Package Script Injection
invariants.description: Modifications to package.json scripts are flagged as potential supply chain attack vectors

invariants.name: Recursive Operation Guard
invariants.description: Flags recursive operations (find -exec, xargs) combined with write/delete operations that could cause widespread damage

invariants.name: Large File Write Limit
invariants.description: Single file writes must not exceed a size threshold to prevent data dumps or runaway generation

invariants.name: No CI/CD Config Modification
invariants.description: CI/CD pipeline configurations must not be modified by governed actions — prevents supply chain attacks via malicious build steps

invariants.name: No Permission Escalation
invariants.description: Agents must not escalate filesystem permissions (world-writable, setuid/setgid, ownership changes, sudoers)

invariants.name: No Governance Self-Modification
invariants.description: Agents must not modify governance configuration (policy files, governance data, policy packs)

invariants.name: Lockfile Integrity
invariants.description: Package lockfiles must stay in sync with manifests

invariants.name: No Container Config Modification
invariants.description: Container configuration files (Dockerfile, docker-compose, .dockerignore, Containerfile) must not be modified without authorization

invariants.name: No Environment Variable Modification
invariants.description: Detects attempts to modify environment variables or shell profile files — environment variables often contain secrets and profile modifications can establish persistent backdoors

invariants.name: No Destructive Migration
invariants.description: Detects potentially destructive database migration files — flags writes to migration directories containing DROP, TRUNCATE, or other destructive DDL

invariants.name: Transitive Effect Analysis
invariants.description: Detects when an agent writes a script or config file whose contents would produce effects that would be denied if executed directly — closes the creative circumvention gap

invariants.name: No IDE Socket Access
invariants.description: Blocks agent access to IDE inter-process communication sockets (VS Code, JetBrains, Cursor) — prevents governance escape via host IDE manipulation
